name: swarm-state-schema
objective: Audit swarm-state.json schema compliance in stampede-commander.agent.md: verify all required fields match the Launch-Proof Contract spec

name: swarm-state-phases
objective: Verify swarm-state.json phase transitions are all documented and monitor reads them correctly

name: swarm-state-telemetry
objective: Audit telemetry counters in swarm-state.json: verify increment logic and final validation

name: swarm-state-heartbeat
objective: Verify heartbeat and updated_at timestamps are maintained during active runs

name: swarm-state-proof
objective: Audit launch_proof object: verify squad_leads_started and workers_started are validated before bundle

name: child-jsonl-format
objective: Verify child-agents.jsonl record format matches spec: ts, event, commander_id, child_id fields

name: child-jsonl-events
objective: Audit all event types in child-agents.jsonl: launch_requested, launch_started, completed, failed

name: child-jsonl-depth
objective: Verify depth field in child-agents.jsonl records: squad_lead=2, worker=3

name: child-jsonl-model
objective: Verify model field is present in every launch_started record in child-agents.jsonl

name: child-jsonl-atomicity
objective: Audit atomicity of JSONL appends: check for race conditions in concurrent writes

name: monitor-squad-count
objective: Audit stampede-monitor.sh parsing of squad_leads_launched from swarm-state.json

name: monitor-worker-count
objective: Audit stampede-monitor.sh parsing of workers_launched and display format

name: monitor-running-count
objective: Verify monitor displays workers_running count correctly from telemetry

name: monitor-heartbeat-age
objective: Audit heartbeat age calculation in monitor and stale detection threshold

name: monitor-warning-logic
objective: Verify 'no sub-agent proof' and 'incomplete proof' warning conditions

name: premium-pool-list
objective: Verify premium_model_pool matches across commander agent, SKILL.md, and launcher

name: premium-banned-list
objective: Verify banned_child_models list is consistent across all components

name: premium-enforcement
objective: Audit how model override is applied to child launches - verify no fallback to banned

name: premium-rotation
objective: Verify model rotation logic distributes across the premium pool evenly

name: premium-violation
objective: Audit what happens when a child falls back to banned model - verify partial status

name: launch-proof-success
objective: Verify success criteria: squad_leads_launched==50 and workers_launched==250

name: launch-proof-partial
objective: Verify partial status when circuit breaker prevents full launch

name: launch-proof-failed
objective: Verify failed status when no squad leads launched

name: launch-proof-monitor
objective: Verify monitor can read and display launch proof from swarm-state.json

name: launch-proof-timing
objective: Audit first_child_started_at and last_child_started_at timestamp requirements

name: launcher-metaswarm-flag
objective: Audit --metaswarm flag handling in stampede.sh: commander pane creation

name: launcher-commander-limit
objective: Verify --metaswarm caps at 5 commanders (line 493-496 in stampede.sh)

name: launcher-model-rotation
objective: Audit --models flag handling for multi-model rotation in metaswarm mode

name: launcher-fleet-json
objective: Verify fleet.json includes role=commander and progress_dir for monitor

name: launcher-agent-selection
objective: Verify launcher uses stampede-commander agent (not stampede-agent) in metaswarm

name: depth-guard-agent-md
objective: Audit stampede-commander.agent.md Depth Guard rules: workers must be leaf nodes

name: depth-guard-worker-lock
objective: Verify Worker Depth Lock block is documented and required in worker prompts

name: depth-guard-tools
objective: Verify stampede-agent tools list excludes 'task' tool (leaf enforcement)

name: depth-guard-max-depth
objective: Audit max_depth=3 enforcement: commander=1, squad_lead=2, worker=3

name: depth-guard-can-launch
objective: Verify can_launch=false is set for all workers in child-agents.jsonl

name: recovery-orphan
objective: Audit orphan recovery logic in monitor: claimed tasks returned to queue when agents die

name: recovery-heartbeat-stale
objective: Verify commander_active check uses heartbeat age vs ORPHAN_RECOVERY_AFTER threshold

name: recovery-dead-pane
objective: Audit dead pane detection via tmux pane_dead flag

name: recovery-all-dead
objective: Verify ALL_DEAD_SINCE grace period (15s) before declaring partial completion

name: recovery-teardown
objective: Audit teardown command: PID cleanup, session kill, state update

name: terminology-sub-agent
objective: Audit user-facing terminology: 'sub-agent' vs 'child agent' vs 'worker' consistency

name: terminology-squad-lead
objective: Verify 'Squad Lead' capitalization and usage across all docs

name: terminology-commander
objective: Verify 'commander' role naming in fleet.json, monitor output, and docs

name: terminology-metaswarm
objective: Verify 'metaswarm' profile naming consistency across components

name: terminology-agent-pulse
objective: Audit 'Agent Pulse' naming in monitor UI and documentation references

name: collab-bus-creation
objective: Verify collaboration bus directory creation in stampede.sh for metaswarm runs

name: collab-protocol
objective: Audit collab/protocol.json schema and required fields

name: collab-proposals
objective: Verify proposals.jsonl required fields: ts, run_id, commander_id, event, item_id, summary

name: collab-reviews
objective: Audit peer review workflow: review other commanders' proposals in reviews.jsonl

name: collab-consensus
objective: Verify consensus promotion and broadcast adoption flow across commanders
